text.title: Research Methodologies Index
text.summary: Routing table for 22 research methodologies across 5 topic files; maps methodology slug to topic file and faion-research-agent mode.

list.item: idea-generation — 7 Ps framework for startup ideas — mode: ideas
paul-graham-questions — 4 questions to discover opportunities — mode: ideas
pain-point-research — mining daily frustrations — mode: ideas
niche-evaluation — 5-dimension scoring — mode: niche
market-research-tam-sam-som — TAM/SAM/SOM sizing — mode: market
trend-analysis — timing and trend assessment — mode: market
competitor-analysis — competitor mapping and positioning — mode: competitors
competitive-intelligence — feature gap identification — mode: competitors

rule.statement: Use the canonical per-methodology folder (e.g. pro/research/researcher/competitor-analysis/) for full framework and agent-integration content, not this index file.
rule.rationale: This index is abridged; the per-folder content carries the complete framework, templates, and gotchas.

list.item: user-interviews — interview design and execution — mode: validate
jobs-to-be-done — JTBD framework — mode: personas
persona-building — creating user personas — mode: personas
problem-validation — evidence-based validation — mode: validate
pain-point-mining — Reddit, forums, reviews — mode: pains
customer-interview-framework — interview structure and questions — mode: validate
niche-viability-scoring — 5-criteria weighted scoring — mode: niche
business-model-research — Blue Ocean strategy — mode: niche
value-proposition-design — value proposition canvas — mode: personas
pricing-research — pricing model selection — mode: pricing
project-naming — 7 naming strategies — mode: names
domain-availability — domain and social handle checking — faion-domain-checker-agent
